query:

UNION ALL SELECT 'jigsaw_expert_members', COUNT(*) FROM jigsaw_expert_members
UNION ALL SELECT 'jigsaw_home_groups', COUNT(*) FROM jigsaw_home_groups
UNION ALL SELECT 'jigsaw_home_members', COUNT(*) FROM jigsaw_home_members
UNION ALL SELECT 'jigsaw_topics', COUNT(*) FROM jigsaw_topics;
